positive: A minimalist celestial landscape featuring stylized mountain ranges silhouetted against a cosmic gradient sky. Include stylized constellations and glowing, abstract ethereal flora elements. The style should be highly geometric, combining elements of Art Nouveau and modern vector illustration, rendered with deep indigo, sapphire, gold leaf accents, and muted teal tones. Central composition, perfectly symmetrical, suitable for a repeating textile pattern or a large chest print. High contrast, clean linework, flat graphic depth, concept art, trending on ArtStation, vector art, high detail, symmetrical.
